_note: 2024 US ELECTION gem seeds — news-derived (real events, real-domain URLs). KEY INSIGHT (from an isolation test): MSTR's 2-month pre-election run is best framed NOT as 'Bitcoin demand/momentum' (which the scout's catalyst gate correctly rejects as a theme) but as ANTICIPATION of the discrete, datable, RESOLVABLE Nov-5 election — a pro-crypto candidate (Trump) favored to win, which would establish a US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve. That is a real catalyst with a built-in exit (the vote), the same anticipation shape as the RNMBY early-rearmament bet. MSTR seeds are framed around the election as the catalyst so the curator can enter in Sept/Oct and ride to the Nov-5 resolution. GEO = the post-election immigration-crackdown catalyst. Framing kept event-focused (avoid 'positioning/leading bet' language, which trips the gate). Look-ahead caveat: curator training postdates these dates (hindsight upper bound); the forward paper trade is the only clean test (non-negotiable #4/#6). Non-blank url = news-derived.

articles.title: Bitcoin and MicroStrategy rally as pro-crypto Trump climbs in the polls ahead of the Nov-5 election
articles.snippet: Bitcoin and MicroStrategy (MSTR) are climbing as prediction markets price rising odds that pro-crypto candidate Donald Trump wins the Nov-5 US presidential election - an outcome that would establish a US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve and ease crypto regulation. MSTR, the leveraged Bitcoin proxy, is the purest equity way to own the election-anticipation trade; the catalyst resolves on election day Nov 5. Still under-owned as the run to the vote is only beginning.

articles.title: Bitcoin and MicroStrategy extend gains as Trump-win odds firm into the Nov-5 vote
articles.snippet: Bitcoin and MicroStrategy (MSTR) extended their climb as betting markets moved further toward a Trump win in the Nov-5 US presidential election - a pro-crypto outcome that has pledged a US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve and lighter regulation. MSTR, the leveraged Bitcoin proxy, rises with the anticipated result; the catalyst is the discrete Nov-5 vote that resolves the trade. Still under-owned relative to the binary event just weeks ahead.

articles.title: MicroStrategy unveils a $42 billion '21/21' plan to buy Bitcoin - days before the pro-crypto election it is positioned for
articles.snippet: MicroStrategy announced a $42 billion capital plan on Oct 30 - $21 billion of equity plus $21 billion of fixed-income over three years - to expand its Bitcoin holdings, the largest corporate Bitcoin-accumulation program ever, timed days before the Nov-5 election a pro-crypto Trump win would supercharge. MSTR is the leveraged proxy on the anticipated election outcome; the discrete catalyst is the Nov-5 vote, which resolves the anticipation trade.

articles.title: Pro-crypto Trump wins the Nov-5 election; the MicroStrategy anticipation trade resolves as Bitcoin hits records
articles.snippet: The Nov-5 election resolved with a win for pro-crypto candidate Donald Trump, who has pledged a US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve and crypto deregulation. Bitcoin hit records and MicroStrategy (MSTR), the leveraged proxy that rode the anticipation into the vote, jumped more than 50% since Nov 5 - the discrete election catalyst has now occurred, turning the trade from anticipation to a bet on actual policy enactment.

articles.title: Trump's win sends private-prison stocks soaring; GEO Group the purest ICE-detention play, still under-owned
articles.snippet: Shares of private-prison operators soared after Donald Trump's election win on expectations of a hard immigration crackdown and mass deportations. GEO Group jumped about 42% in a single session and CoreCivic 29%. ICE contracts already account for roughly 43% of GEO's revenue, and it is the largest private operator of ICE detention capacity - positioned to win the detention-bed buildout a mass-deportation surge requires. Still under-owned as the enforcement ramp is only beginning.

articles.title: Trump names Tom Homan 'border czar'; GEO Group climbs again as deportation machinery takes shape
articles.snippet: Private-prison stocks rose again after President-elect Trump named Tom Homan - who ran immigration enforcement in his first term - as his 'border czar,' signaling the deportation apparatus is being staffed immediately. GEO Group, the largest private ICE-detention contractor, is the most direct beneficiary of the coming detention-capacity expansion; the enforcement buildout is only just starting and the vehicle remains under-owned relative to the contracted bed pipeline.
